title: REQUISITE NEEDS Insulated Picnic Bag 15L Large Cooler Bag Lunch Bag For Lunch/Work/School/Beach/Picnic (Grey)
features: Versatility: Designed for adults, the meal box is ideal for various settings, including the office, work, picnics, beach outings, and trips.
Convenient for On-the-Go: With its portable design, the meal box is perfect for those who lead a busy lifestyle, ensuring you can enjoy a satisfying meal wherever you are.

GENEROUSLY SIZED: The dimensions of 11.8" (30cm) × 9.1" (23cm) × 9.1" (23cm), this adult lunchbox boasts a substantial 15L maximum capacity. Its spacious interior comfortably accommodates up to 24 cans of coke (330ml) or a variety of lunch items, including sandwiches, salad, snacks, drinks, and fruits. Ideal for various settings such as the office, work, picnics, beach outings, or trips, this lunchbox ensures you have ample space for all your culinary needs.
Optimal Organization: The ample space allows you to organize and carry up to 24 cans of coke (330ml) or a well-rounded meal, comprising sandwiches, salads, snacks, drinks, and fruits.
Durable Construction: Crafted with quality materials, the meal box is built to withstand daily use, providing long-lasting durability.
